prompt_text:
### Demographics: 78-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 14 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Not on dialysis)
ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history; Coronary artery disease (History of CABG)
Body mass index category: Normal
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Diabetic Foot Ulcer / High-Risk Foot
Alzheimer's Disease
Appendicitis (status post appendectomy)
Thyroid nodule (status post lobectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Not on dialysis); HF (No); ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history; Coronary artery disease (History of CABG); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (younger brother)
- Social history: Current smoker (5 cigarettes/day for 20 years; ~5 pack-years); No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Donepezil (10 mg nightly), Memantine (10 mg twice daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 74.1 kg; Height 184.8 cm; BMI 21.7 kg/m²; Blood pressure 124/61 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.1%; 9 months ago 7.3%; 6 months ago 7.2%; 3 months ago 7.3%; current 8.0%), FPG (12 months ago 176mg/dL; 9 months ago 194mg/dL; 6 months ago 190mg/dL; 3 months ago 189mg/dL; current 200mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 75.1kg; 9 months ago 75.8kg; 6 months ago 70.7kg; 3 months ago 72.7kg; current 74.1kg), Height (12 months ago 184.8cm; 9 months ago 184.8cm; 6 months ago 184.8cm; 3 months ago 184.8cm; current 184.8cm), BMI (12 months ago 22.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 22.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 21.0kg/m²; current 21.7kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 124mmHg; 9 months ago 125mmHg; 6 months ago 124mmHg; 3 months ago 123mmHg; current 124mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 60mmHg; 9 months ago 60mmHg; 6 months ago 62mmHg; 3 months ago 62mmHg; current 61mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 25U/L; 9 months ago 26U/L; 6 months ago 26U/L; 3 months ago 18U/L; current 21U/L), AST (12 months ago 18U/L; 9 months ago 18U/L; 6 months ago 19U/L; 3 months ago 16U/L; current 20U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.7mg/dL; current 0.7mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 10mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 8.0mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 7.7mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 5.5mL/min/1.73m²; current 6mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 492mg/g; 9 months ago 706mg/g; 6 months ago 759mg/g; 3 months ago 587mg/g; current 743mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 79mg/dL; 9 months ago 73mg/dL; 6 months ago 78mg/dL; 3 months ago 76mg/dL; current 75mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 45mg/dL; 9 months ago 42mg/dL; 6 months ago 46mg/dL; 3 months ago 45mg/dL; current 44mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 113mg/dL; 9 months ago 108mg/dL; 6 months ago 93mg/dL; 3 months ago 112mg/dL; current 101mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.0g/dL; 6 months ago 11.0g/dL; 3 months ago 10.2g/dL; current 10.3g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.00 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
